chunks.title: How Each week is defined
chunks.text: Welcome back to this new video, where I will talk about how you can get content in week by week and what you expect in terms of content  So let's start. This is a long journey, you have to work hard for many months. If I talk about the final outcome after 6 months or 9 months, then it will be difficult for you to measure how I am progressing.  To streamline this, we have divided the whole course into multiple milestones.  A milestone is a logical chunk, which you can do on the basis of independent utility.  For example, you can do a milestone, for example, get up.

chunks.title: How Each week is defined
chunks.text: These are the examples of your courses.  Once milestone 1 is over, you will have a test on the basis of that milestone.  Once milestone 1 is over, you will have a milestone 2.  Once milestone 2 is over, you will have a milestone 3.  This will comprise of multiple weeks.

chunks.text: If I talk about a milestone, it will comprise of multiple modules.  For each module, you can think of one week of content.  Each module will comprise of multiple modules.  For each course, you will get weekly content every week.  You will get weekly content every week.
